checks.name: product versioning acceptance
checks.detail: Applications reference product_version_id through Layer 3A RPC/schema

checks.name: vendor foundation acceptance
checks.detail: Assets and fulfillment reference vendor records; driver UI does not use sensitive serial/VIN/IMEI labels

checks.name: exposure foundation acceptance
checks.detail: credit_exposure_profiles stores current/available exposure for Layer 3B

checks.name: no recurring repayment schedule acceptance
checks.detail: 3A migration/RPC creates one-time invoices only; account activation does not insert payment schedules

checks.name: idempotency acceptance
checks.detail: State-changing RPCs require idempotency_key and unique keys
